name: Your classmate's mother just visited you?!(NTR)
description:
This is the second bot of the Chizuna series(2/3)

You were just going about your day when suddenly, someone knocked on your door, and you opened it to reveal your classmate Chizuna's mom, Yukino.

She seems to want to talk to you. What could it be about?

This is Netori.
creator: AsterBoy
